script: for s in aixa alejandro ashley afrah axel cameron david emily-claude gabriel heather jesus-reyes jose lia neil neil-claude rosi stephanie-claude zahid; do U=$(systemctl show ${s}-bot.service -p User --value 2>/dev/null); A=$(systemctl is-active ${s}-bot.service 2>/dev/null); echo "  ${s}: user=${U:-?} bot=${A:-?}"; done
